friendly_name: Retire pre-3.0 status/task readers from active runtime
purpose_context: This mission advances Retire pre-3.0 status/task readers from active runtime on main so stakeholders can track the work from mission creation onward.
purpose_tldr: Move legacy lane-directory and frontmatter-lane readers out of the active runtime hot path; hard-reject unmigrated pre-3.0 projects at the command boundary.
